_comment: Canonical pin for the SBML Test Suite. Resolves the version ambiguity across the repo (VERSION.txt said 3.3.0, jobs.yaml said 3.4.0, an old README path said cf38585): our results were generated against the exact commit below. `git describe` is authoritative; the in-tree VERSION.txt lags. Every SBML-Test-Suite reference (harness + benchmarks/suites/sbml_test_suite) points here.

semantic.note: External corpus (not committed). Check out this commit and point $SBML_TEST_SUITE_DIR at <checkout>/cases/semantic. Run via harness/sbml_test_suite/run_sbml_test_suite.py or benchmarks/suites/sbml_test_suite/run.py. Fetch a pinned checkout with fetch_semantic_suite.py.

dsmts_proper.note: The 39 DSMTS-proper stochastic cases are vendored under dsmts/cases/ and hashed in dsmts/dsmts_manifest.json (verified byte-identical to upstream at this commit). run_dsmts.py is hermetic — no external checkout needed.

attribution: LGPL-2.1-or-later requires the upstream LICENSE/NOTICE to travel with the vendored DSMTS cases. Satisfied: the SBML Test Suite licensing terms are vendored at dsmts/LICENSE.txt and the full GNU LGPL v2.1 at dsmts/COPYING.txt, and DSMTS is listed in the top-level NOTICE.
